overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest trail. The character travels through a natural woodland environment with stone walls and wooden fences lining the path, approaching distant stone ruins under warm afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with stone wall boundary

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forested area with two swords on back

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
dense coniferous trees lining both sides of the trail
tall leafless tree trunk visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense pine forest. A stone wall runs along the left side of the path while a large dead tree stands prominently ahead in the distance.

events.description: large rock outcrop appears on the right side as the path opens slightly

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing wooden fence sections and rocky terrain

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder formation on the right side of the path
rustic wooden fence posts and rails replacing the stone wall intermittently

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest with a large rock outcrop now dominating the right side. The stone wall on the left becomes intermittent, replaced by sections of wooden fence, as the vegetation opens up slightly.

events.description: distant stone ruins become visible ahead as the forest opens up

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant stone structure visible at the end of the path

entered.detail: ancient stone structure or tower visible in the distance at the path's end
tall reddish-brown grass patches lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider area with the stone wall returning consistently on the left. Ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance ahead, drawing closer as the character approaches. The vegetation transitions to taller autumn-colored grasses on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that gradually opens from a dense pine woodland into a wide clearing featuring ancient ruins. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by thick pines, moving past a stone wall on the left toward a prominent dead tree in the distance. As the character advances, the scenery shifts to include a large rock outcrop on the right while the stone wall becomes intermittent, giving way to sections of wooden fencing. The path then expands into a wider area where the stone wall returns consistently and the vegetation transitions into tall, autumn-colored grasses. Finally, the camera draws closer to the ancient stone ruins that emerge ahead under the warm light.
